nodes.name: 大斑啄木鸟
nodes.summary: 大斑啄木鸟（Great spotted woodpecker，学名 Dendrocopos major），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于爱尔兰岛。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 爱尔兰岛
nodes.summary: 爱尔兰岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括红胸黑雁、粉脚雁、赤颈鸭等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|upright|Large trees provide habitat for excavating feeding holes. The species ranges across Eurasia from Ireland to Japan, and in North Africa from Morocco to Tunisia; it is absent only from those areas too cold or dry to have suitable woodland habitat. It is found in a wide variety of woodlands, broadleaf, coniferous or mixed, and in modified habitats like parks, gardens and olive groves
